facts: Pit bulls have been given a bad rap. BADRAP was started in the San Francisco Bay area on behalf of "pit bulls and their people" and was ranked nationally as a No. 1 high-impact nonprofit for animal welfare.
Dogs can see in color, but not as vividly as humans.
Your pup reaches his full size between 12 and 24 months.

Baks the blind boxer has a seeing eye goose named Buttons. Buttons the four-year-old goose leads her pup around everywhere either by hanging onto him with her neck, or by honking to tell him which way to go.
A dog's sense of smell is about 10,000 times stronger than a human's.
